name: I'm on a sandy beach
hints: A sandy beach on a tropical island. There is a man here and a jungle to explore.
Talk to the man or examine him. GO JUNGLE to enter the dense tropical forest and explore the island.
GO JUNGLE to enter the dense jungle. The man may have useful information. DIG in the jungle with a shovel to find buried items.
notes: Sandy beach on a tropical island. A man is present (may provide clues or interaction). GO JUNGLE enters the dense jungle (room 9). Reached by going ashore from the ship when anchored near this island.
